title: 567 open deals have no owner assigned
description: 567 open deals in pipeline 695988740 have no hubspot_owner_id. These are pipeline blind spots — no rep is accountable for them, they won't appear in rep activity reports, and they may be stalling due to lack of ownership. Some have recent modification dates (last 24-48 hours), suggesting they may still be actively worked but improperly attributed.
additional_notes: Several unowned deals also have overdue close dates (still open months past their expected close). This double data quality issue (no owner + overdue close date) makes these deals especially hard to track or act on.
recommendation: ASSIGN_REVIEW_QUEUE: Have a sales manager review the 567 unowned deals and assign to appropriate reps. Agent cannot autonomously assign ownership without knowing rep territories, capacity, and deal context.
risk: HIGH (business risk) — unowned deals may be going cold with no follow-up
approval_options: PROVIDE_ASSIGNMENT_RULES: Give agent a rule (e.g., round-robin by rep ID list, or assign all to manager for review) and agent will execute bulk assignment
MANUAL_REVIEW: Sales manager manually reviews and assigns in HubSpot UI
EXPORT_LIST: Agent generates a report of all 567 deals for offline review
